---
id: ADR-0030
title: Rotate the on-call pager weekly
status: accepted
description: The on-call pager rotates between engineers on a weekly schedule.
---

# ADR-0030: Rotate the on-call pager weekly

Leaving the on-call pager with one engineer indefinitely led to burnout and
uneven escalation coverage.

## Decision

Rotate the on-call pager between engineers on a fixed weekly schedule, handing
over every Monday morning.

## Consequences

Escalation coverage is shared evenly and no single engineer carries the pager
indefinitely.
